Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Hin Keng Street (Hin Keng Station bound) between Hin Kwai Lane and Che Kung Miu Road are still being closed to all traffic. 
The slow lane of Che Kung Miu Road (Hin Keng Bus Terminus bound) near Hin Keng Street is also closed. Affected bus routes have been diverted:
KMB route no. 46X, 88K, 281M (Hin Keng/ San Tin Wai bound)
KMB route no. 80, 87B, 85B (Mei Lam/ San Tin Wai/ Chun Shek bound)
LWB route no. A42 (Airport bound).  The following temporary traffic arrangements have been implemented:
i) Vehicles travelling on Hin Keng Street (Hin Keng Station bound) are prohibited to enter Che Kung Miu Road;
ii) Vehicles from Hin Keng Street could travel via Fu Kin Street and Tin Sam Street towards Che Kung Miu Road.

因水管爆裂，顯徑街(往顯徑站方向)介乎顯貴里與車公廟路之間的全線仍然封閉。

九巴第80、87B、85B號線(往美林/新田圍/秦石方向)
龍運第A42號線(往機場方向)。  現已實施以下的臨時交通安排:
i)車輛不能從顯徑街(往顯徑站方向)行駛往車公廟路;
ii)在顯徑街行駛的車輛，可途經富健街及田心街前往車公廟路。

2024-08-09T10:43:00.CONTENT_EN: Passengers for High Speed Rail holding a Mainland Travel Permit for Hong Kong and Macao Permanent Residents (Non-Chinese Citizens) can now use this permit to purchase tickets through the 12306 official website and mobile app, station ticketing counters or appointed agents. Please use the staff assistance channel to enter and exit the gate until the gate system upgrade by the mainland authorities is completed.
2024-08-09T10:43:00.CONTENT_CN: 持有「港澳居民來往內地通行證（非中國籍）」的高鐵乘客現可使用該證件於12306官方網站和手機應用程式、車站票務櫃位及指定代理購票。在內地相關單位完成閘機升級前，乘客請使用職員輔助通道出入閘。
